title: staging_chromosome_meiosis_events_v0 — loose capture of a per-chrom × per-dyad event-count TSV
description: Staging payload for a per-(chromosome × dyad) CO/DCO/NCO aggregator. Captures columns + rows verbatim; promote to chromosome_meiosis_events_v1 via the normalize_chromosome_meiosis_events action once the producer's column set is stable.
